name: ames-preferred-mcps
description: Preferred third-party MCP servers curated by Oliver Ames. Includes Apple Docs, Apple Notifier, Drafts, Excel, Google Workspace, macOS Automator, MarkItDown, Pandoc, Peekaboo, XcodeBuild, iMCP, Sim Genie, and Sosumi integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Curated MCP server pack for Apple, docs, productivity, and local tooling.
interface.longDescription: A curated bundle of Oliver's preferred MCP servers, including Apple Docs, Apple Notifier, Drafts, Excel, Google Workspace, macOS Automator, MarkItDown, Pandoc, Peekaboo, XcodeBuildMCP, iMCP, Sim Genie, and Sosumi. Some servers require local apps or credentials.
defaultPrompt: Look up this Apple API in Apple Docs.
